sourceMovie.title: Just Like Heaven
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Just Like Heaven works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Swiss Army Man
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Just Like Heaven clicked for you, Swiss Army Man (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Just Like Heaven?
faq.answer: Try Swiss Army Man, The Purple Rose of Cairo, Heart and Souls—each shares DNA with Just Like Heaven while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Just Like Heaven?
faq.answer: Just Like Heaven (2005) is best described as Comedy, Romance, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Just Like Heaven worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
